name: Delete catalog item

targetRestContract.notes: Returns HTTP 200 OK with body { status: 'Deleted' } on success — not HTTP 204 No Content. Returns 404 when the item does not exist. No request body.

notes: Returns HTTP 200 with { status: 'Deleted' } rather than the more conventional HTTP 204 No Content — the Java target should preserve this for Angular client compatibility.

No cascade delete logic in the endpoint itself; EF Core handles any FK constraints defined on the schema. BasketItems.CatalogItemId references CatalogItems — the Java target must verify database referential action (RESTRICT vs CASCADE) before deleting.
Requires JWT Bearer token with ADMINISTRATORS role (BlazorShared.Authorization.Constants.Roles.ADMINISTRATORS = 'Administrators').
